prompt: Review the test coverage on my project — it has some pytest tests but nothing for the shell scripts or the systemd service integration.

assertions.text: A coverage gap analysis document or report exists identifying what's missing
Bats tests (.bats files) were created for shell scripts
Tests for systemd service integration exist (testing .service file, ExecStart, ExecStop, etc.)
A top-level test runner (Makefile target, run_tests.sh, or equivalent) that runs all language test suites
Output explicitly identifies what areas are missing from the existing pytest tests
The run correctly identified coverage-gap mode rather than greenfield mode
